titleStmt.title: SII 29.100: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 100. (A.R. No. B. 746 of 1962-63.) ANDUR, TULJAPUR TALUK, OSMANABAD DISTRICT, MAHARASHTRA.

summary.p: On a slab fixed in to a dilapidated wall in the village.
This record is engraved on the same slab above No. 63.

This damaged record has registered a grant of 5 gadyāṇas per year for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple of Māṇikēśvara by the queen Mājiladēvi probably in the presence of heggaḍe Mattiyaṇa-nāyaka of Hannipaḷḷi and karaṇās.
Nāḍa adhikāri was made responsible for maintaining this dharma. It is dated in Chālukya Bhūlōkamalla year 11, Naḷa, Kārttika, śu. 1, Monday. It corresponds to 1136 A.D., September 28, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī cāḷukya bhūlōkamalla variṣada 11 da neyanaḷa saṁvatsarada kārttika suddha pāḍiva sō
mavāradaṁdu śrī matu piriyarasi paṭṭamahādēvi mājiladēviya raṁgabhōga
ṇiṁpūrva hanni paḷḷiya heggaḍe mattiyaṇanāyaka pramukha karaṇaṁga
harastaḷake Āpaṭa mudreyalli śrī māṇikēśvara dēvara naṁdādīvige
ge biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5 Ide variṣaṁ prati koṭṭaru Idaṁ nāḍadhikāri
pāḷisidavaru svarggāpavargaṁgaḷaṁnu bhōgiparu kiḍisida
rmmaru . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
